prompt_inputs.goal: Training for a marathon; needs high-carbohydrate intake to support endurance running performance and glycogen recovery

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1 day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks) that is compact and concise
Diet is clearly carbohydrate-dominant, appropriate for endurance marathon training
Meal plan is practical and tailored to the athlete's weight, without introducing restricted foods since none were specified
Includes approximate portion sizes or quantities for each meal/snack
task_description: write a compact,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Endurance runner training for a marathon, high-carb intake, no dietary restrictions

solution_criteria: Provides a 1 day meal plan compact and concise
All meals/foods are vegan (no animal products)
Includes adequate protein intake appropriate for muscle gain at 82kg, using combinations or sources that supply complete protein (all essential amino acids)
Plan is practical and specific (lists foods/meals, not just macros)
task_description: write a compact,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Vegan bodybuilder focused on muscle gain, needing complete protein sources

prompt_inputs.goal: Support fast recovery between two swim training sessions in one day (morning and evening practice) while maintaining energy for a growing youth athlete
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Nut allergy (no tree nuts or peanuts)

solution_criteria: Provides a full 1-day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, dinner, plus snacks) that is compact and concise
Includes at least one meal or snack specifically positioned for fast recovery after each training session
Contains no nuts or nut-derived ingredients anywhere in the plan
Meals are appropriate in portion/energy for a youth athlete's size and training demands
task_description: write a compact,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Youth swimmer with a nut allergy, multiple training sessions in one day requiring fast recovery meals
